title: AI chatbots can help abusers stalk and harass women, Refuge warns
description: The charity’s research is part of a report detailing how artificial intelligence can be used to facilitate violence against women
content:
AI chatbots can help stalkers target and harass women, a charity has warned.
Chatbots helped a potential stalker who wanted to harass a victim without their knowledge, according to Refuge. The tools also gave advice on how to evade police investigati... [3790 chars]
